title: Employer steel delivery may constrain B01 reinforcement works
evidence: Available reinforcement balance is below the next two planned slab requirements
potential_impact: Potential interruption to reinforcement and concrete sequence
recommended_intervention: Confirm dated delivery schedule and approve interim allocation plan

title: Revised IFC information is pending for B02 basement interfaces
evidence: Open design register items remain unanswered beyond the planned response date
potential_impact: Shop drawing rework and delayed basement release
recommended_intervention: Hold focused design workshop and issue consolidated response matrix

title: B03 shop-drawing resubmission cycle exceeds planned turnaround
evidence: Three structural submittals are in second resubmission with unresolved comments
recommended_intervention: Agree comment-closure protocol and daily review session

title: MEP sleeve coordination is incomplete for B04 slab zones
evidence: Approved coordinated builder-work drawings are unavailable for two slab zones
potential_impact: Hold points before reinforcement inspection and concrete pour
recommended_intervention: Freeze coordinated openings and issue zone-by-zone release plan

title: Water-tank excavation dewatering capacity may be insufficient
evidence: Observed inflow exceeded the original pump duty during the latest inspection
potential_impact: Reduced excavation productivity and possible formation deterioration
recommended_intervention: Mobilize standby pump and confirm discharge route

title: Tunnel ventilation fan delivery is not contractually confirmed
evidence: Supplier has not issued an approved manufacturing and shipping baseline
recommended_intervention: Escalate supplier recovery schedule with weekly factory evidence

title: Night-work permit renewal may lapse before tunnel shift expansion
evidence: Renewal application remains under authority review
potential_impact: Loss of planned second shift and reduced advance rate
recommended_intervention: Secure interim permit confirmation and authority meeting

title: Utility diversion access window is shorter than the approved plan
evidence: Traffic authority notice limits the available work window to six hours per night
potential_impact: Longer diversion duration and increased remobilization
recommended_intervention: Re-sequence crews and request extended weekend possession

title: B01 formwork productivity remains below recovery target
evidence: Seven-day average output is 82 percent of the approved recovery rate
potential_impact: Erosion of available float on successor slab activities
recommended_intervention: Add second striking crew and track daily zone output

title: Two projects have not submitted current weekly progress updates
evidence: Data freshness dashboard shows updates older than seven days
potential_impact: Reduced confidence in executive portfolio reporting
recommended_intervention: Escalate missing updates and lock reporting cut-off

title: B04 specialist subcontractor manpower is below approved histogram
evidence: Mobilized workforce is 18 operatives below the two-week lookahead requirement
potential_impact: Late completion of embedded services and blockwork fronts
recommended_intervention: Submit manpower recovery curve and named mobilization list

title: Concrete trial-mix approval is pending for water-retaining elements
evidence: Laboratory results were submitted but final consultant approval is outstanding
potential_impact: Delay to raft concrete booking and reinforcement release
recommended_intervention: Close technical comments and reserve provisional batching slot
